title: Figura Badge Backport Tool
description: Ports in-development self-service badge selection features to 0.1.5 Figura.
body:
This [Figura](/mod/figura) addon adds the `/figura badge` command, which lets you change your badge (also called "Figura Mark") to one of the pride variants. This feature is built-in to base Figura in pre-release development versions of 1.20.1, but if you don't want to switch versions or download from GitHub, this adddon can add the feature to an existing stable installation.

A copy of Figura *without* this functionality is required to use this addon.

Most versions of Minecraft that Figura supports are supported; notable exceptions are **1.16.5** and the pre-release versions for **1.21.5** and **1.21.6**. All modloaders are supported.

**You do not need to keep this addon installed to keep your pride badge.** (feel free to remove it after you change your badge; the data is stored on Figura's backend server)

## Usage
* Ensure you are connected to the Figura Cloud (also "backend").
* Run `/figura badge <name>` to set your badge to a pride-related variant.
* Run `/figura badge clear` to return your badge to the default flat colored texture.
* You may need to reload your avatar to see the change occur.
